title: Zero In® Cedarwood Moth Repellent Hanger - Twinpack, Natural and Chemical-Free Moth Protection for Clothes and Wardrobes, Fresh Cedar Aroma, Long-Lasting
features: NATURAL MOTH PROTECTION: Infused with high-quality cedarwood, these hangers provide a natural deterrent against moths and other insects, helping to preserve your clothes and fabrics
FRESH CEDAR AROMA: The cedarwood releases a subtle, pleasant fragrance that not only repels pests but also leaves your wardrobe smelling fresh and clean
DURABLE & STYLISH: Made from sturdy wood, these hangers are both functional and stylish, ensuring your clothes are hung securely and elegantly

SUSTAINABLE: Crafted from sustainably sourced cedarwood, our hangers are an environmentally friendly choice that aligns with your green lifestyle. Refresh and reuse using Zero In Cedarwood Refresher Spray (Product Code ZER039)
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for use in closets, wardrobes, and storage areas where moths are a concern
